candidate_findings.evidence: Top header text appears at the top margin and the extracted text matches the rendered NIST title/header line.
candidate_findings.rationale: Preset type, location, and text agree with the page chrome evidence.

candidate_findings.evidence: Horizontal rule/underscore header line appears directly below the top header.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate is page chrome with an appropriate top-margin bounding box and matching extracted underscore line.

candidate_findings.evidence: Footer shows CHAPTER THREE at left and PAGE 18 at right in the bottom margin.
candidate_findings.rationale: Footer chrome is correctly classified as side/page chrome; normalized text order is acceptable for the visual footer content.

candidate_findings.evidence: The rendered boilerplate is a narrow vertical line of text along the far left margin, but the annotated red box extends far into the main body column and overlaps body text/list/discussion areas.
candidate_findings.rationale: The semantic type and text are side chrome, but the bounding box is substantially too wide for the visible vertical boilerplate.
candidate_findings.suggested_fix_surface: Tighten the boilerplate side-chrome bounding box to the narrow left-margin vertical text instead of spanning into the main content column.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered heading reads 3.1 ACCESS CONTROL in large bold text near the top of the body.
candidate_findings.rationale: Extracted section heading text, type, and bounding box match the visual heading.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered blue underlined link reads Quick link to Access Control Summary Table.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate text and bounding box match the visible link; preset text is acceptable for this section-link block.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered control heading line contains AC-1 followed by POLICY AND PROCEDURES.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate captures the visible control heading with the expected section-heading role and appropriate bounds.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered field label reads Control: below the AC-1 heading.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted label text and small bounding box match the visual label.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered list item starts with a. Develop, document, and disseminate to ... and wraps to the next line.
candidate_findings.rationale: List type, text, indentation, and bounding box agree with the rendered list item.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered nested list item starts with 1. [Selection (one or more): ...] access control policy that:
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate correctly captures the nested list item, including wrapping and indentation.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered nested item starts with (a) Addresses purpose, scope, roles, responsibilities, management commitment...
candidate_findings.rationale: Text, list classification, and bounding box match the visual nested list item.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered nested item starts with (b) Is consistent with applicable laws, executive orders...
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate accurately captures the list text and placement.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered nested item starts with 2. Procedures to facilitate the implementation of the access control policy...
candidate_findings.rationale: List type, text, wrapping, and bounds agree with the rendered page.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered list item starts with b. Designate an [Assignment: organization-defined official]...
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate matches the visible list item and its body-column indentation.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered list item reads c. Review and update the current access control:
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted list item text, type, and bounding box align with the visual evidence.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered nested item starts with 1. Policy [Assignment: organization-defined frequency]...
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate correctly captures the nested list item and its line wrap.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered nested item starts with 2. Procedures [Assignment: organization-defined frequency]...
candidate_findings.rationale: The list text, indentation, and bounding box match the rendered item.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered paragraph begins Discussion: Access control policy and procedures address the controls in the AC family... and continues through the long discussion paragraph.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted normalized discussion paragraph corresponds to the visible text block and the bounding box covers the paragraph region.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered line reads Related Controls: IA-1, PM-9, PM-24, PS-8, SI-12.
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate captures the related-controls line with appropriate text type and bounds.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered line reads Control Enhancements: None.
candidate_findings.rationale: The extracted labeled text and bounding box match the visible line.

candidate_findings.evidence: Rendered references line lists [OMB A-130], [SP 800-12], [SP 800-30], [SP 800-39], [SP 800-100], and [IR 7874].
candidate_findings.rationale: The candidate is correctly classified as a reference line and matches the visual text and placement.

page_rationale: The main text, headings, list items, footer, top header, and reference lines are generally extracted with matching text and structure. The page has a defect because the left-margin vertical boilerplate side-chrome candidate has a bounding box that is much wider than the rendered boilerplate and overlaps body content.
